headline: SpaceX’s IPO could be largest in history. Here’s how it compares to previous record-holders
summary: The hotly anticipated IPO is set to be the largest in stock market history, and is more than 7.5 times Alibaba's IPO, in second place.

headline: Airbnb Stock In Focus As CEO Chesky Unveils New AI Venture
summary: Airbnb CEO Brian Chesky is launching a new AI venture focused on user interaction and design, separate from conventional chatbot products. The initiative is positioned as a distinct effort outside typical AI assistants, aiming to rethink how users experience technology. This move introduces a fresh angle to the story around NasdaqGS:ABNB, beyond valuation, analyst commentary, or regulatory themes. Airbnb, traded as NasdaqGS:ABNB, built its business around a global marketplace for short term...
